title: MinerU PDF Parser
description: Serverless PDF → Markdown / JSON via MinerU. 3.1.x runtime running the MinerU2.5-Pro-2604-1.2B VLM. Also accepts images (PNG/JPEG/GIF/BMP/TIFF/WebP), DOCX, PPTX, and XLSX. Scales to zero with a 10 s idle window, ~$0.0003 per page on 24 GB Ampere serverless (Flex rate; see runpod.io/pricing). Five MinerU backends (pipeline / vlm-auto / vlm-http-client / hybrid-auto / hybrid-http-client), three input transports (URL / base64 / mounted volume), three output formats (gzipped tarball / inline / S3 presigned URL). Generic document-parsing primitive for RAG and document-context systems.

input.name: HuggingFace token
input.description: Optional. Only needed if you want to pull gated or private models (e.g. a fine-tune of MinerU on your own corpus). The default model is public.

input.name: MinerU model source
input.description: Where MinerU pulls weights from. 'huggingface' is the default and works everywhere. 'modelscope' is a faster mirror for users in China. 'local' requires a mineru.json + pre-staged snapshots and is for advanced/offline setups.

input.name: VLM model override
input.description: Override the VLM model name. Currently consumed only by the vlm-http-client and hybrid-http-client backends; the local vlm-auto-engine ignores this and always loads MinerU's library default (MinerU2.5-Pro-2604-1.2B).

input.name: S3 endpoint URL (optional)
input.description: Endpoint URL for an S3-compatible bucket. Required only if callers will request `return: "s3"` in their jobs. Works with AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, Hetzner, MinIO, etc. Example: https://<account>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com

input.name: S3 bucket name (optional)
input.description: Name of the S3-compatible bucket to upload to. Required only if callers will request `return: "s3"`.

input.name: S3 access key ID (optional)
input.description: Access key ID for the S3-compatible bucket. Required only if callers will request `return: "s3"`. Stored as a worker env var; not exposed to job inputs or outputs.

input.name: S3 secret access key (optional)
input.description: Secret access key for the S3-compatible bucket. Required only if callers will request `return: "s3"`. Stored as a worker env var; not exposed to job inputs or outputs.
